Class InventoryDAO

java.lang.Object
com.project.dao.InventoryDAO
public class InventoryDAO extends Object
Data Access Object (DAO) for inventory items.

This class handles database operations related to inventory items, including retrieving, inserting, updating, and deactivating inventory records stored in the inventory_items table.

    void

    Convenience overload used by the manager controller to add a default consumable inventory item.

    Soft deletes an inventory item by marking it inactive.

  • Method Details

    • getAllInventory

      public List<InventoryItem> getAllInventory()
      Retrieves all active inventory items from the database.
      Returns:
      list of active inventory items

    • addInventoryItem

      public void addInventoryItem(InventoryItem item)
      Inserts a new inventory item into the database.
      Parameters:
      item - the inventory item to add

    • updateInventoryQuantity

      public void updateInventoryQuantity(int inventoryItemId, double newQuantity)
      Updates the quantity of an existing inventory item.
      Parameters:
      inventoryItemId - ID of the inventory item
      newQuantity - new stock quantity

    • deleteInventoryItem

      public void deleteInventoryItem(int inventoryItemId)
      Soft deletes an inventory item by marking it inactive.
      Parameters:
      inventoryItemId - ID of the inventory item to deactivate

    • addInventoryItem

      public boolean addInventoryItem(String name, int qty)
      Convenience overload used by the manager controller to add a default consumable inventory item.
      Parameters:
      name - item name
      qty - initial quantity
      Returns:
      true if the item was successfully added

    • addInventoryItem

      public boolean addInventoryItem(String name, String itemType, int qty)
      Inserts a new inventory item with a specified type.
      Parameters:
      name - item name
      itemType - category of the inventory item
      qty - initial quantity
      Returns:
      true if insertion succeeded

    • updateInventoryItem

      public boolean updateInventoryItem(int inventoryItemId, String name, int qty)
      Updates the name and quantity of an existing inventory item.
      Parameters:
      inventoryItemId - item ID
      name - updated item name
      qty - updated quantity
      Returns:
      true if update succeeded
